description_long: This object depicts a group of six adult pedestrians standing side by side, each with a distinct outfit and helmet. The figures are dressed in athletic wear, including sleeveless tops and shorts, and each wears sneakers. The helmets are uniform in style, suggesting a sporty or protective function, and the figures have short hair visible beneath the helmets. The group displays a variety of clothing styles, with some figures wearing knee-high socks and others in standard athletic shorts. The overall appearance is casual and sporty, suitable for urban or recreational environments.
description: A group of six adult pedestrians in athletic wear and helmets, standing side by side in a casual, sporty pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing six adults in athletic outfits and helmets, arms outstretched, with clear visibility of their clothing and footwear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of each figure, showing the depth of the group and the fit of their clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures, including the back details of their outfits and helmets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the group, emphasizing the stance and posture of each figure.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear including sleeveless tops, shorts, and helmets
